Hey everyone, welcome back. Hopefully you enjoyed yesterday's training video and you got a lot out of it and you saw some of the framework of what's going to be happening, what you're going to be experiencing. I hope that you had a chance if you have kids that you showed that to them, got them excited, and have them going through the workbook as well so they can also get excited about these concepts because I promise you if they get started when they're 8, 10, 12, 15, 17, 21, whatever it is, imagine where they're going to be at by the time they're my age or your age is going to be exciting. So I'm pumped. Now really quick, what today's training is going to be is a very simple one. Again, the whole goal of this first week is to help you to believe. If I can give you belief, it's going to make next 30 days really, really simple. So this is a presentation from one of our funnel hacking live events where I titled the presentation one funnel way and what I decided to do in this presentation was not to go and share the highlight reel like most people typically do of all the successes I've had but said I want to share everything that hit the cutting room floor, all of the failures, the ups, the downs, the lonely times, the pain, you know, and I hope two things from this. Number one is I hope it helps build connection with me and you. I can serve you to higher level the more you trust me. I hope that this vulnerability will help us to gain that trust and hopefully don't tease me too much. I do cry a few times in the video. And then number two is hopefully to help build belief for you. I know that all of you guys here are different paths. Some of you guys right now are at the spot I was at multiple times in this video where you lost everything and you're like, I don't know what to do. All right. How many of you guys are in that spot right now? And some of you guys are like, Hey, I'm just getting started. I have a job that I hate. I want to figure this out. Like is it worth it? And hopefully if that's where you're at, this video will help you to see that it is worth it. You'll see the impact you're able to make and how much fun you can actually have on this journey. So if you guys are the top and you just want to go to the next level, you have a chance to kind of increase your belief and show you guys behind the scenes and some of the funnels that propelled me and got me out of the deepest, darkest holes in my life and helped me get back out. So I hope you enjoyed this presentation. Have a lot of fun with it. I recommend again, if you're doing this challenge as a family, pull it up, watch it on TV together, take notes. I don't swear in my videos. So everything's kid, clean and appropriate as well. But I hope you understand that you're literally just one funnel away. So scroll down below, click on the button and let's watch one funnel way presentation. Thank you. Bye.
